heroHeadline: Russia's Oil Revenues Hit War-High as Iran Disruption Boosts Global Prices; Sanctions Pressure Grows
heroSubtitle: Moscow's oil export revenues reach highest level since early 2022, fueled by Iran-driven global price surge despite Ukrainian port attacks and Western price caps
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
